headline: Enphase Energy Initiates Shipments Of Its IQ9S-3P Commercial Microinverter, Across U.S.
summary: Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH), a global energy technology company, today announced that it began production shipments of its IQ9S-3P™ Commercial Microinverter, the company's most powerful microinverter
